documents.message_info:
🔥Error en logs🔥

Se ha producido {{context.value}} nuevos logs de error en los últimos minutos.

{{#context.hits}}

⚠️ Message: {{_source.message}} -

{{/context.hits}}

query.query: cloud.provider : "gcp" and environment : "pro-utils" and k8s.namespace.name : "awx-cpd" and k8s.container.name : "awx-task" and message : "is no longer waiting: reaping"
message: "Failed to resolve" and NOT message: "ExpressionFactory" and cmdb.app_cmdb: *

annotations.message: Se han producido {{context.hits.0._source.errores}} errores en {{context.hits.0._source.apps}} aplicaciones diferentes

labels.alertname: Error al resolver DNS en múltiples aplicaciones

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM logs-otel*,OCP-PRO04:logs-otel*
| WHERE message LIKE "*Failed to resolve*" AND NOT message LIKE "*ExpressionFactory*" AND cmdb.app_cmdb IS NOT NULL AND @timestamp >= NOW() - 4 minutes and @timestamp < NOW()
| STATS errores = COUNT(*), @timestamp = MAX(@timestamp) BY cloud.provider, cmdb.app_cmdb, k8s.namespace.name
| STATS apps = COUNT(cmdb.app_cmdb), @timestamp = MAX (@timestamp), errores = SUM(errores)
| WHERE apps > 0
| KEEP @timestamp, apps, errores

annotations.message: Error al enviar llamadas a las APIs en {{context.sourceFields.application}}

labels.alertname: Error al llamar a API en {{context.sourceFields.application}}

query.query: message: "Error al llamar a la API" and cmdb.app_cmdb: *

annotations.message: Se han producido {{context.hits.0._source.errores}} errores en {{context.hits.0._source.apps}} aplicaciones diferentes

labels.alertname: Error al resolver llamar a APIs en múltiples aplicaciones

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM logs-otel*,OCP-PRO04:logs-otel*
| WHERE message LIKE "*Error al llamar a la API*" AND cmdb.app_cmdb IS NOT NULL AND @timestamp >= NOW() - 4 minutes and @timestamp < NOW()
| STATS errores = COUNT(*), @timestamp = MAX(@timestamp) BY cloud.provider, cmdb.app_cmdb, k8s.namespace.name
| STATS apps = COUNT(cmdb.app_cmdb), @timestamp = MAX (@timestamp), errores = SUM(errores)
| WHERE apps > 0
| KEEP @timestamp, apps, errores

data.name: [SDDR] RVM Status - Error en cabecera QUERY DSL
